findings.description: The knowledge file presents an explicit rule: "基本的な1シートテストでは`nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport`を使用し、複数シート分割テストでは`nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport`を使用する". The source never states this rule. It simply shows two separate code examples that happen to use different import packages — the introductory class example uses `nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport`, and the split-sheet example uses `nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport` — but no explanatory text in the source connects the import choice to single-sheet vs. multi-sheet usage.
findings.source_evidence: First code block (intro): `import nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport;`. Split-sheet code block: `import nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport;`. No accompanying text in the source explains the difference or prescribes when to use each.

findings.description: The source has 4 h2-level sections (テストケース分割方針, 基本的な記述方法, 1テストケースを複数シートを分割する場合, 1シートに複数ケースを含める場合), but the knowledge file merges the first three into s1, yielding only 2 sections total. The テストケース分割方針 h2 also has two h3 subsections (複雑なテストケースの場合, 非常に簡単なテストケースの場合) that are silently absorbed.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings: 「テストケース分割方針」「基本的な記述方法」「1テストケースを複数シートを分割する場合」「1シートに複数ケースを含める場合」. Knowledge file index: s1 (merges first 3), s2 (4th).

findings.description: Several column names used in the test sheet tables appear in the source but are absent from s1 hints: `expectedStatusCode`, `setUpTable`, `setUpFile`, `expectedTable`, `expectedFile`, `outFile`. These are searchable field identifiers a developer would use when looking up how to configure test sheets.
findings.source_evidence: Source table headers include: `expectedStatusCode`, `setUpTable`, `setUpFile`, `expectedTable`, `expectedFile`, `requestPath` (already present), `outFile`. Only `requestPath`, `LIST_MAP`, and `testShots` are currently in s1 hints.
